signals.snippet: Hi Siddhi, please cancel all my services with zoca.

cause_analysis.narrative: HRIS Platinum Services churned on 2026-03-23 after 194 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-28 via app_chat — 54 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 54 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

messages.body: Request Closed

Hey Paul, I hope you’re doing well! We will make sure you don’t see a further charges that is due the next month. I would really want to understand what’s the concern here and how can we help you and address it in the best way possible
Hi, please cancel my account.
Stop billing effective immediately

Hi Paul,  	 I am really sorry to hear that you wish to discontinue. We truly value you and your business, and we would appreciate it if you could help us understand the reason behind this decision. Your feedback helps us improve and ensures we close things in a way that supports your business long-term.
I am thankful for your help.  I would like to cancel please effective immediately.  No call needed.  Thanks.

Paul, I truly empathize with your concern. Let's schedule a call to explore how we can best support you. If our approach aligns with your needs, we can proceed from there. If not, we will ensure a smooth transition for you.
Tell me how can I help you out better?
It has been decided we would like to cancel.  Just doesn\'t work for us.  Please help me cancel our account thank you.
